name: Smart Agent SDK
brief: AL SDK for building AI agents in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central on top of Smart Agents.
description: Open-source AL SDK that lets Business Central (D365 BC) partners build AI features — chat, drafting, classification, anomaly detection, multi-turn conversations, tool-call confirmation, REST endpoints for Power Automate — on top of the Smart Agents platform with zero compile-time dependency. Ships with 14 sample pattern apps. A Copilot-class AI experience for ERP, partner-managed and AppSource-ready. MIT licensed.
